scripts.deploy:frontend-build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.deploy:worker:versioned: npm run build && cdk deploy worker --require-approval never
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:storage && npm run deploy:auth && npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:frontend && npm run config:write && npm run deploy:notification && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:eventbridge && npm run deploy:routes && npm run dcv:download && npm run deploy:frontend-build && npm run deploy:frontend-deployment
scripts.deploy:release: cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && npm run deploy:storage && npm run deploy:auth && npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:frontend && npm run config:write && npm run deploy:notification && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:eventbridge && npm run deploy:routes && npm run dcv:download && npm run deploy:frontend-build && npm run deploy:frontend-deployment
